meta.title: NEW Hailuo 2.3 AI Video Generator is INSANE for Cinematic AI Videos
meta.description:
Hailuo 2.3 just launched! In this video we take a look at this new ai video generator
Try Hailuo 2.3 here 👉 https://hailuoai.video/?utm_media_source=YT&utm_campaign=kol&utm_content=DanKieft 

There is a new AI Video Generator! Hailuo 2.3 just launched and in this video we will be taking a deep dive at all the new updates this video generator brings. This new model is great for ai motion control making your videos feel more cinematic then ever!

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
